nodes.label: Maintenance Mode Page with Test Key Auth
nodes.norm_label: maintenance mode page with test key auth

nodes.label: Comment System
nodes.rationale: Inline comment CRUD with sensitive content check and anti-bullying gate, loaded via fetch to /api/posts/:id/comments

nodes.label: Content Reporting Mechanism
nodes.rationale: Modal-based report flow for both posts and comments with predefined reason selection and optional supplement text, POST to /api/reports or /api/comments/:id/report

nodes.label: Sensitive Content Warning
nodes.rationale: Two-step dialog allowing user to edit or force-submit when sensitive content detected, with visual warning about moderation and penalties

nodes.label: Anti-Bullying Protection
nodes.rationale: Zero-tolerance bullying check that only allows returning to edit (no force-submit option), with shield icon and strong warning language

nodes.label: Zhixue Student Certification
nodes.rationale: Dual-path certification (zhixue auto-login via Playwright vs manual upload with name/email/proof images) with status tracking (pending/approved/rejected), POST to /api/user/bind-zhixue

nodes.label: Admin Account Binding
nodes.rationale: Bind a user account to an admin account with password verification for both parties, POST/DELETE to /api/user/bind-admin, displays super/admin badge on posts

nodes.label: Profile Editing System
nodes.rationale: Modal-based nickname and JPG avatar update with client-side size/type validation, PATCH to /api/user/me
